rules.headings: Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight), never use Inter for headings.
rules.body: Generous line height (leading-relaxed), light/regular weights for elegance.

glassmorphism_specs.usage: Use for sticky headers, testimonial bento cards, floating CTAs, and service cards.

animation_patterns.reveal: GSAP/Framer Motion scroll reveals (y: 40, opacity: 0 -> 1) with stagger.
animation_patterns.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero background and large images.
animation_patterns.hover_morphing: Premium hover states on cards - scale up image slightly (1.05x), reveal hidden text, border glow.
animation_patterns.marquee: Continuous slow scrolling for brand logos using react-fast-marquee or framer-motion.
animation_patterns.page_transitions: Fade to black/dark overlay on route changes.

Home.Hero: Cinematic full-screen (100vh). Video or high-res image background with dark overlay. Large Clash Display headline. Floating/rotating eyewear elements.
Home.Stats: Animated counters (Years, Customers, Brands) with gold accents. Grid layout.
Home.Services: Bento grid of hover-expand cards. Glassmorphism surfaces. High-quality imagery for each service.
Home.Brands_Marquee: Infinite scrolling logo wall with premium brands listed in the problem statement.
Home.Meta_AI_Section: Dark, futuristic section with glowing accents. Parallax effect showcasing Ray-Ban/Oakley smart glasses.
Home.Testimonials: Apple-style glass bento grid. Smooth entrance animations.
Home.Store_Experience: Interactive image gallery showcasing the modern optical store interior.
Home.CTA: Large section with 'Book Eye Test', prominent gold button, elegant typography.

layouts.About: Storytelling focused. Timeline of the boutique, imagery of the team, and philosophy.
layouts.Eye_Testing: Detailed breakdown of the 7-step eye test. Clinical yet premium feel. High-quality optometry images.
layouts.Lenses: Educational section comparing Essilor, Zeiss, Hoya. Visual comparison sliders if possible.
layouts.Frames_Sunglasses: Product catalog style but editorial. Large imagery, minimal text.
layouts.Meta_AI_Smart_Glasses: Dedicated landing page. Tech-focused, heavy use of black and gold/neon accents.
layouts.Contact_Lenses: Clean, soft aesthetic but keeping the dark theme. Focus on comfort and brands.
layouts.Kids_Vision_Care: Slightly warmer tone within the dark theme. Imagery of kids in stylish glasses.
layouts.Brands: Comprehensive A-Z list or grid of all carried brands with their logos.
layouts.Blog: Editorial bento grid for articles. Focus on eye health and eyewear trends.
layouts.Contact: Premium form (posting to webhook placeholder). Google Map embed of Hadapsar, Pune. Hours and direct contact info.

navigation.style: Sticky/Fixed floating header. Glassmorphism applied (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50).
navigation.links: Home, Brands, Eye Testing, Collections, Meta AI, Contact.
navigation.cta: Prominent 'Book Appointment' button with gold accent border.
navigation.mobile: Full-screen dark overlay menu with staggered link reveal.

footer.content: Large Eylux logo. Minimalist links. Newsletter signup with simple underline input. Social links.
footer.layout: Grid structure with high negative space.

floating_ctas.WhatsApp: Fixed bottom-right. Glassmorphic circular button with WhatsApp icon. Pulse animation.
floating_ctas.Book_Test: Fixed bottom-center or left. Pill-shaped glassmorphic button. Gold text.

hero_sunglasses.description: Black framed sunglasses, ideal for hero background overlay.

luxury_frames.description: Black wayfarer sunglasses on black surface for collections.

store_interior_2.description: Contemporary interior with marble/chandelier (use for luxury vibe).

smart_glasses.description: Futuristic smart glasses for Meta AI section.

person_luxury_glasses.description: Woman wearing premium eyeglasses for Frames section.

eye_test_clinic.description: Medical eye test equipment for Eye Testing section.

kids_glasses.description: Little girl wearing glasses for Kids Vision Care section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Avoid Shadcn for standard structural sections as they require deep customization to fit the 'Adinshaw' premium vibe.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-test-btn').
Strictly follow the color palette: Matte Black, Deep Navy, White, and Gold. NO PURPLE OR TEAL.
Implement glassmorphism heavily for cards and headers using 'bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10'.
Use standard semantic HTML with accessible aria labels for links and buttons.
Ensure 'Inter' is used for body and 'Clash Display' (if available, else 'Satoshi' or strong variable sans) for Headings.
Never use generic placeholder images; use the provided image URLs.
